title: Build a Student Grade Tracker
description: Build a complete student grade tracking system from scratch, adding C++ features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a program with data structures, file I/O, classes, and sorting — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete student grade tracker with structs, dynamic arrays, file persistence, a class hierarchy with inheritance, sorting algorithms, and exception handling — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced C++ concepts.
